knowledge_atoms.text: Circle all the verbs in the text and complete the table.
Did he have a cold yesterday?

knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你还做了其他什么事吗？

knowledge_atoms.text: Did you play football with Zhang Peng?
Hey, Amy. Let's go to the bookstore. I want to buy the new film magazine.
Hi, Grandpa. How are you? How was your weekend?
I cleaned my room and washed my clothes on Saturday.
I stayed at home all weekend and slept.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 我整个周末都待在家里睡觉。

knowledge_atoms.text: I stayed at home and watched TV.
I'm fine, Mike. It was good, thank you.
It wasn't a good stay. Maybe we can write an email and say sorry to them.

Last weekend, the Wu family were not happy with their room. The people in Room 301 ________________________ all night. It was very noisy. The father ________________________ from the kitchen but ________________________. Also, the mother ________________________ but the lamp ________________________. The TV didn't work either.
Look at the table below for a few seconds. Then cover it. Ask and answer.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 看下面的表格几秒钟。然后把它盖住。进行问答。

knowledge_atoms.text: Read the letter again quickly. Find the sentences that describe Pictures 1-3.
That's nice. Did you do anything else?
What are you going to do next weekend?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你下个周末打算做什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 迈克的爷爷上周末做了什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: What did you do last weekend?
What did you do on Saturday afternoon?
What did you do on Saturday morning?
What did you do on Sunday afternoon?
What did you do on Sunday morning?
What did you do yesterday/last night ...?
What do you think she did yesterday?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你认为她昨天做了什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: What do you usually do on weekends?
Yes, I did. It was great.
Yes, I did. We played football on Sunday.
Yes, it talked about a lot of new films. What did you do last weekend? Did you see a film?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit Two. 本页是Unit Two的主情景图，模拟了社交媒体的界面，展示了Mike发布的两条动态。第一条动态发布时间为'Saturday April 5th 15:30'，界面显示有关注、粉丝、微博数量以及'转发 (30) | 收藏 | 评论 (15)'，配图为Mike在拖地、洗衣服和做作业。第二条动态发布时间为'Sunday April 6th 20:17'，界面显示有相应的账号数据以及'转发 (26) | 收藏 | 评论 (10)'，配图为Mike和朋友在划船、踢足球以及在电影院看电影（电影画面中有两只松鼠，并带有字幕'Wow!'）。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Saturday?
Can you say: Unit Two

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. John and Mike are talking about what they did last weekend.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What did you do last weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. Mike is talking to his Grandpa on the phone about their weekend.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word stayed at home?
Can you say: How was your weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. Illustrations of four weekend activities and a dialogue between Mike and Chen Jie about their weekend.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word cleaned my room?
Can you say: How was your weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. John and Amy are talking at a bus stop.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word film magazine?
Can you say: What did you do last weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. Illustrations of past activities and time expressions, followed by a dialogue between John and Amy.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word read a book?
Can you say: What did you do last weekend?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. An introduction to Mrs Broom's job and a feedback letter from Wu Binbin's family about their bad stay at the Holiday Hotel.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word housekeeper?
Can you say: What do you think she did yesterday?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. An email from Mrs Broom to the Manager about the Wu family's bad stay at the hotel.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Dear Manager,

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Last weekend. Read and complete the sentences with the correct past tense form of the verbs.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Read and complete the sentences.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. Zip and Zoom are talking about Zoom's busy weekend.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: How was your weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the picture scene activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 本页是Unit Two的主情景图，模拟了社交媒体的界面，展示了Mike发布的两条动态。第一条动态发布时间为'Saturday April 5th 15:30'，界面显示有关注、粉丝、微博数量以及'转发 (30) | 收藏 | 评论 (15)'，配图为Mike在拖地、洗衣服和做作业。第二条动态发布时间为'Sunday April 6th 20:17'，界面显示有相应的账号数据以及'转发 (26) | 收藏 | 评论 (10)'，配图为Mike和朋友在划船、踢足球以及在电影院看电影（电影画面中有两只松鼠，并带有字幕'Wow!'）。 Key patterns: Unit Two
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Saturday?
Can you say: Unit Two

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the picture scene activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: The page shows John's social media posts. The first post is on Saturday, April 5th at 17:23, with pictures of him sleeping and reading a book. The second post is on Sunday, April 6th at 20:45, with pictures of him listening to music and watching TV. Key patterns: Last weekend
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Last weekend

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: John and Mike are talking about what they did last weekend. Key patterns: What did you do last weekend?; Did you play football with Zhang Peng?
core_patterns: What did you do last weekend?
Did you play football with Zhang Peng?
I cleaned my room and washed my clothes on Saturday.
Yes, I did. We played football on Sunday.
allowed_answer_scope: I cleaned my room and washed my clothes on Saturday.
Yes, I did. We played football on Sunday.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What did you do last weekend?
return_anchors: What did you do last weekend?
Did you play football with Zhang Peng?
I cleaned my room and washed my clothes on Saturday.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Sarah and Mike are talking about this weekend. Key patterns: Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Mike is talking to his Grandpa on the phone about their weekend. Key patterns: How was your weekend?; What did you do?
core_patterns: Hi, Grandpa. How are you? How was your weekend?
That's nice. Did you do anything else?
I'm fine, Mike. It was good, thank you.
allowed_answer_scope: I'm fine, Mike. It was good, thank you.
Well, I stayed at home with your grandma. We drank tea in the afternoon and watched TV.
I watched TV, too. I watched some children's shows on TV.
Yes, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word stayed at home?
Can you say: How was your weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Questions for practice based on the dialogue and personal experience. Key patterns: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?; How was your weekend?
core_patterns: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?
What did you do last weekend?
What are you going to do next weekend?
allowed_answer_scope: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?
What did you do last weekend?
What are you going to do next weekend?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?
return_anchors: What did Mike's grandpa do last weekend?
What did you do last weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Illustrations of four weekend activities and a dialogue between Mike and Chen Jie about their weekend. Key patterns: How was your weekend?; It was fine, thanks.
core_patterns: I stayed at home and watched TV.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word cleaned my room?
Can you say: How was your weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students ask each other about their weekend activities, fill in a chart, and report to the class. Key patterns: How was your weekend?; It was OK.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word did something else?
Can you say: How was your weekend?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Wu Binbin is asking John about last weekend. Key patterns: Listen and circle.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and circle.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: John and Amy are talking at a bus stop. Key patterns: What did you do last weekend?; Did you see a film?
core_patterns: What did you do last weekend?
I stayed at home all weekend and slept.
Yes, it talked about a lot of new films. What did you do last weekend? Did you see a film?
Hey, Amy. Let's go to the bookstore. I want to buy the new film magazine.
allowed_answer_scope: Hey, Amy. Let's go to the bookstore. I want to buy the new film magazine.
Oh, I read it last weekend.
No, I had a cold. I stayed at home all weekend and slept.
Oh, I'm sorry. I'm happy you feel better now.
Thanks. Let's go by bus. It's faster than walking.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word film magazine?
Can you say: What did you do last weekend?
return_anchors: What did you do last weekend?
I stayed at home all weekend and slept.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice speaking activity.

allowed_answer_scope: He stayed at home all weekend and slept.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Students practice asking about past and usual activities. Key patterns: What did you do yesterday/last night ...?; What do you usually do on weekends?
core_patterns: What did you do yesterday/last night ...?
What do you usually do on weekends?
allowed_answer_scope: What did you do yesterday/last night ...?
What do you usually do on weekends?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What did you do yesterday/last night ...?
return_anchors: What did you do yesterday/last night ...?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: An email from Mrs Broom to the Manager about the Wu family's bad stay at the hotel. Key patterns: Dear Manager,; Last weekend, the Wu family were not happy with their room. The people in Room 301 ________________________ all night. It was very noisy. The father ________________________ from the kitchen but ________________________. Also, the mother ________________________ but the lamp ________________________. The TV didn't work either.
core_patterns: Last weekend, the Wu family were not happy with their room. The people in Room 301 ________________________ all night. It was very noisy. The father ________________________ from the kitchen but ________________________. Also, the mother ________________________ but the lamp ________________________. The TV didn't work either.
It wasn't a good stay. Maybe we can write an email and say sorry to them.
allowed_answer_scope: Last weekend, the Wu family were not happy with their room. The people in Room 301 ________________________ all night. It was very noisy. The father ________________________ from the kitchen but ________________________. Also, the mother ________________________ but the lamp ________________________. The TV didn't work either.
It wasn't a good stay. Maybe we can write an email and say sorry to them.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Dear Manager,
return_anchors: Last weekend, the Wu family were not happy with their room. The people in Room 301 ________________________ all night. It was very noisy. The father ________________________ from the kitchen but ________________________. Also, the mother ________________________ but the lamp ________________________. The TV didn't work either.
It wasn't a good stay. Maybe we can write an email and say sorry to them.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and retell the key story events.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: Zip and Zoom are talking about Zoom's busy weekend. Key patterns: How was your weekend?; What did you do on Saturday morning?
core_patterns: What did you do on Saturday morning?
What did you do on Saturday afternoon?
What did you do on Sunday morning?
What did you do on Sunday afternoon?
allowed_answer_scope: I washed my schoolbag. Then I went to the park.
I did my homework. Then I went fishing.
I cleaned my room. Then I visited my grandparents.
I played football. Then I watched TV.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: How was your weekend?
return_anchors: What did you do on Saturday morning?
What did you do on Saturday afternoon?
